name: Lewd Common Sense - Mind Control RPG [Revival]
description:
Everything you do is totally normal and everyone accepts it! This is an alternative to my original character "Common Sense Alteration Fantasy RPG" (Art by Kakuninii)
- From the original bot creator Syahir
----------------------------------------------------
Heya! @Rozora here! I liked the creator of the original bot but due to Janitor's new rules and its lead to deletion, I have decided to recreate it out from memory. So yeah, I revived a bot. Thank you to the Original creator Syahir of the bot and remember I revived it out of memory and may not be the same as the original but it may be similar. See ya all!

[V.0.7,6]
- Thanks and credits to @Astra_Planet for a prompt that they made to make the bot somewhat functional ( I appreciate it deeply! I hope your prompt fixes it, too.)

  • The bot should now be able to prevent you from sexually interacting with minors and now people you want to interact with are set to 18+ sexually (I will fix it if proven false or has errors)

  • Fixed the problem with Bot telling that {{user}} is a minor despite being an adult. (also made it so it cannot tell if you are a minor or an adult without permission

  • Tweaked a bit with the bot, Not sure if it will recognize genders now. Hopefully it does!

  • Fixed the boy saying it’s title as it’s name. It Will now be nameless unless you mention a name of give it a name. (Thank you for your pantience.)

  • (New!): i got an email about a thumbnail removal by Janitor, so i have now cropped the Thumbnail heavily. Sorry ya all… Rules are rules.

  • Note: if you Somehow for Whatever reasons it is somehow get 18- into your chats then not my proplem because why would you discover the ability to do that? But if it’s genuiently the case please comment then. I will fix it when I can.
